generatorFunctionRef.description: The ref of the generator function (the function returned by the compiled code).

isModule.description: Whether the script is a module (doesn't implement a protocol like Node, Layout, etc.

dependencyIds.description: Ids of any scripts this script DIRECTLY requires (not dependencies of dependencies) in its core

compilationOrder.description: Topological order from compilation — scripts with lower values are depended on by scripts with higher values. Not exported to runtime; the order is inherent in the position the ScriptAsset is written into the .riv.
